title: TestExpectation
description: ADR-0014's adopter test-fixture format: the expect.yaml shape (directory-case form, .assent/tests/<pack>/<case>/expect.yaml) and the cases.yaml inline-shorthand wrapper (.assent/tests/<pack>/cases.yaml) are one contract, not two — every cases[].expect reuses #/$defs/expectation verbatim. This is the format `assent test` (E6) and every shipped example pack (E9) validate against.

findings.description: Must-contain by default (each listed finding must fire, others may also fire); set the sibling `exact: true` for a closed list (ADR-0017 consequence: exact is the safety default for anyone opting in).

exact.description: true: findings[] is the complete, closed list of findings the case must produce (ADR-0017 consequence — exact is the safety default). false/absent: must-contain semantics, other findings may also fire.

absent.description: Rule names that must NOT fire for this case.

obligation.description: Present only when this finding corresponds to an obligation-proving rule's prove.obligation (MergePolicy, S01) — mirrors DecisionRecord finding.obligation (S02).

effect.description: The same closed effect vocabulary frozen by MergePolicy onFailure.effect (S01) and DecisionRecord/PresentationModel finding.effect (S02) — require-review is satisfied only by forge-proven ApprovalEvidence (S04), never a bare vouch or a resolved-discussion proxy (ADR-0017 §3). `effect: vouch` no longer exists in the vocabulary anywhere and is rejected here as an unknown enum value (retired, ADR-0017 consequences).

path.description: JSON Pointer to the affected value — a structured safety assertion counted by `assent test --coverage`.

message~.description: Discouraged-for-safety substring/regex match on the rendered message (ADR-0014 amendment). This is a presentation-layer assertion: `assent test --coverage` counts only structured safety assertions (decision, rule, effect, findings[].path, score), never this field; rendered-output goldens belong to the presentation/render test layer (`assent render` fixtures against PresentationModel, ADR-0016 §4). Documentation note only, not a validation rule — the field stays schema-legal.

file.description: Path of the single file this inline case exercises.

base.description: The file's content on the target branch, inline (any shape — the resource's own format, not a fixed contract field); null for a new-file case.

head.description: The file's content as the MR proposes it, inline; null for a deleted-file case.

facts.description: Optional stubbed provider results, keyed by provider name (providers are never called in tests, ADR-0014).

expect.description: Reuses the exact same expectation shape as the directory-case expect.yaml — single source of truth (REQ-P3-E1-S05-02).
